title: relay ws: GROUP_LIST does N+1 queries (one per group for member_count)
description: relay/src/ws.rs GROUP_LIST fetches all groups for the user (1 query) then calls store.member_count() for each group (N queries). For a user in 50 groups this is 51 sequential DB round-trips. Fix: add a single aggregation query SELECT group_id, COUNT(*) FROM group_members GROUP BY group_id and join the results in memory, reducing to 2 queries total.
